emotional_tone: Premium, calm, ambient, non-intrusive. Finger-friendly for 24/7 tablet use.

typography.rules: Avoid Inter or Roboto. Use Outfit for a premium tech feel, Manrope for high-legibility data points.

layout_and_spacing.container_padding: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 for main views.
layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: Use a bento-style modular layout. Put the most important status in the upper-left area.
layout_and_spacing.room_navigation: Organize by rooms. Use a side or top navigation to switch views quickly.
layout_and_spacing.3d_map: Canvas takes central focus in landscape mode. Use absolute positioning or large flex areas.

surfaces_and_components.cards: Subtle Glassmorphism. Dark-first hierarchy. Use 1px delicate inner borders (border-white/10). No full-screen gradients. Max 12px border-radius.
surfaces_and_components.status_strip: Reserve a slim top band for critical live data (temperature, server status).
surfaces_and_components.device_toggles: Provide soft motion/tactile feedback. Color indicates state (Amber for on, Gray for off).

icons.style: stroke-width: 1.5, minimalist, size: 24 or 32 for main toggles.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute. Example: data-testid='login-form-submit-button'

image_urls.description: Ambient dark modern living room for lock screen or screensaver

instructions_to_main_agent: Write EXCLUSIVELY .js files, DO NOT use .tsx.
Build a React Native Expo application tailored for a 10-inch landscape tablet.
Implement 3D map functionality using @react-three/fiber and @react-three/drei (React Native compatible versions).
Apply 'data-testid' attribute on all tappable and key informational elements.
Use styling based on the design tokens above. Avoid generic purple or teal colors.
Provide multi-vendor abstraction UI (Tapo, Shelly, Sonoff) in the device addition flow.
Create an in-app Settings screen to configure the Flask Server URL and other preferences.
Group sensor data (temp, humidity, consumption) logically in a dedicated bento grid card.
